1	use std::sync::Arc;
2	use tokio::sync::mpsc;
3	
4	#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
5	pub struct AppState {
6	    pub tabs: Vec<TabState>,
7	    pub active_tab: usize,
8	    pub git: GitState,
9	    pub files: FileTreeState,
10	    pub skills: SkillsState,
11	    pub layout: LayoutState,
12	    pub notifications: Vec<NotificationEntry>,
13	    pub confirm_dialog: Option<ConfirmDialog>,
14	    pub should_quit: bool,
15	    pub cwd: std::path::PathBuf,
16	    pub last_left_border_col: u16,
17	    pub last_right_border_col: u16,
18	    pub hover_left_border: bool,
19	    pub hover_right_border: bool,
20	}
21	
22	impl AppState {
23	    pub fn new(cwd: std::path::PathBuf) -> Self {
24	        Self {
25	            tabs: vec![TabState::new_chat("1", "New Session")],
26	            active_tab: 0,
27	            git: GitState::default(),
28	            files: FileTreeState::default(),
29	            skills: SkillsState::default(),
30	            layout: LayoutState::default(),
31	            notifications: Vec::new(),
32	            confirm_dialog: None,
33	            should_quit: false,
34	            cwd,
35	            last_left_border_col: 0,
36	            last_right_border_col: 0,
37	            hover_left_border: false,
38	            hover_right_border: false,
39	        }
40	    }
41	
42	    pub fn active_tab(&self) -> Option<&TabState> { self.tabs.get(self.active_tab) }
43	    pub fn active_tab_mut(&mut self) -> Option<&mut TabState> { self.tabs.get_mut(self.active_tab) }
44	}
45	
46	#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
47	pub struct TabState {
48	    pub id: String,
49	    pub name: String,
50	    pub kind: TabKind,
51	    pub messages: Vec<ChatMessage>,
52	    pub streaming: Option<String>,
53	    pub input: InputState,
54	    pub chat_scroll: usize,
55	    pub status: StatusData,
56	    pub pins: Vec<Pin>,
57	    pub pin_selected: usize,
58	    pub pending_prompt: Option<String>,
59	}
60	
61	impl TabState {
62	    pub fn new_chat(id: &str, name: &str) -> Self {
63	        Self {
64	            id: id.to_string(),
65	            name: name.to_string(),
66	            kind: TabKind::Chat { agent_tx: None },
67	            messages: Vec::new(),
68	            streaming: None,
69	            input: InputState::new(),
70	            chat_scroll: 0,
71	            status: StatusData::default(),
72	            pins: Vec::new(),
73	            pin_selected: 0,
74	            pending_prompt: None,
75	        }
76	    }
77	}
78	
79	#[allow(dead_code)]
80	#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
81	pub enum TabKind {
82	    Chat { agent_tx: Option<Arc<mpsc::Sender<crate::agent_task::AgentCommand>>> },
83	    FileViewer { path: String, content: String, language: String, scroll: usize },
84	    DiffViewer { path: String, diff: String, staged: bool, scroll: usize },
85	}
86	
87	#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
88	pub struct ChatMessage {
89	    pub role: MessageRole,
90	    pub content: String,
91	}
92	
93	#[allow(dead_code)]
94	#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq)]
95	pub enum MessageRole { User, Assistant, System }
96	
97	#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
98	pub struct InputState {
99	    pub lines: Vec<String>,
100	    pub cursor_line: usize,
101	    pub cursor_col: usize,
102	    pub selection: Option<Selection>,
103	    pub scroll_offset: usize,
104	}
105	
106	impl InputState {
107	    pub fn new() -> Self {
108	        Self { lines: vec![String::new()], cursor_line: 0, cursor_col: 0, selection: None, scroll_offset: 0 }
109	    }
110	    pub fn text(&self) -> String { self.lines.join("\n") }
111	    pub fn is_empty(&self) -> bool { self.lines.iter().all(|l| l.is_empty()) }
112	}
113	
114	impl Default for InputState {
115	    fn default() -> Self { Self::new() }
116	}
117	
118	#[allow(dead_code)]
119	#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq)]
120	pub struct Selection {
121	    pub start_line: usize,
122	    pub start_col: usize,
123	    pub end_line: usize,
124	    pub end_col: usize,
125	}
126	
127	#[derive(Debug, Clone, Default)]
128	pub struct StatusData {
129	    pub model: String,
130	    pub context_tokens: u32,
131	    pub context_percent: f32,
132	    pub cost: f64,
133	    pub git_branch: String,
134	}
135	
136	#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
137	pub struct LayoutState {
138	    pub left_width_pct: f32,
139	    pub right_width_pct: f32,
140	    pub left_panel: LeftPanel,
141	    pub right_panel: RightPanel,
142	    pub left_visible: bool,
143	    pub right_visible: bool,
144	    pub focus: Focus,
145	    pub drag: Option<DragState>,
146	    pub terminal_cols: u16,
147	    pub terminal_rows: u16,
148	}
149	
150	impl Default for LayoutState {
151	    fn default() -> Self {
152	        Self {
153	            left_width_pct: 0.20,
154	            right_width_pct: 0.20,
155	            left_panel: LeftPanel::Sessions,
156	            right_panel: RightPanel::Skills,
157	            left_visible: true,
158	            right_visible: true,
159	            focus: Focus::Input,
160	            drag: None,
161	            terminal_cols: 80,
162	            terminal_rows: 24,
163	        }
164	    }
165	}
166	
167	impl LayoutState {
168	    pub fn left_width(&self) -> u16 {
169	        let w = (self.terminal_cols as f32 * self.left_width_pct) as u16;
170	        w.clamp(10, ((self.terminal_cols as f32 * 0.4) as u16).max(10))
171	    }
172	    pub fn right_width(&self) -> u16 {
173	        let w = (self.terminal_cols as f32 * self.right_width_pct) as u16;
174	        w.clamp(10, ((self.terminal_cols as f32 * 0.4) as u16).max(10))
175	    }
176	}

The tricky part is the Up/Down for FileViewer/DiffViewer needs to NOT conflict with the input handler (which is guarded by `Focus::Input`). Let me add them carefully:

input.command:
cd /Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui && git add rust/crates/app/src/ && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(ui): sessions, git, files, skills panels + file/diff viewer tabs

Implements Tasks 13-18: left sidebar with Sessions/Git/Files panel tabs,
right sidebar with Skills/MCPs panel tabs, file viewer and diff viewer
tab kinds, filetree loader, and router handlers for navigation/actions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

content.content:

content.text:
DONE. All tasks 13-18 implemented and committed.

**Summary:**

- **23 tests pass**, 0 failures (same count as before — no regressions)
- **9 warnings** — all pre-existing dead_code warnings on fields/variants reserved for future tasks, none new

**Files created (12 total, 976 insertions):**
- `/rust/crates/app/src/filetree.rs` — directory loader with ignore list
- `/rust/crates/app/src/ui/sessions.rs` — sessions list panel
- `/rust/crates/app/src/ui/git_panel.rs` — git staged/unstaged panel with inline action hints
- `/rust/crates/app/src/ui/files.rs` — file tree panel with icons and pin indicators
- `/rust/crates/app/src/ui/sidebar_left.rs` — 3-tab left sidebar (Sessions/Git/Files)
- `/rust/crates/app/src/ui/skills.rs` — 3-tier skills panel (Repo/User/Global) with override dimming
- `/rust/crates/app/src/ui/sidebar_right.rs` — 2-tab right sidebar (Commands/MCPs)
- `/rust/crates/app/src/ui/file_viewer.rs` — file viewer with line numbers
- `/rust/crates/app/src/ui/diff_viewer.rs` — diff viewer with syntax coloring (+/-/@@ headers)

**Files updated:**
- `ui/mod.rs` — wired all new modules, FileViewer/DiffViewer render to full center column
- `main.rs` — added `mod filetree`, initial file tree + skills load on startup
- `router.rs` — added git navigation (Up/Down/Enter/Alt+s/u/d), files navigation (Up/Down/Enter), Alt+P pin, file/diff scroll, skills tier collapse (1/2/3 when RightSidebar focused)

**Key design note:** All Up/Down handlers in router are guarded with `!matches!(state.layout.focus, Focus::Input)` to avoid conflicting with the input editor's arrow key handling.
